title: Mini-cons - Slime Chunk & Deep Dark Icon
description: A light-weight client side mod that shows a small icon by your hotbar when you're in a slime chunk or a Ancient CIty.
body: This light weight mod lets you clearly know when you're inside a slime chunk or an Ancient City. I am in active devlopment and would love if anyone would like to suggest additonal icons to be added. I wanted to try and make this so it wasn't giving an unfair advantage.
